name: detector contract: completes in ≤5s on a 1000-file changeset (§2.2)
command: START=$(date +%s); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts" >/dev/null 2>&1; END=$(date +%s); ELAPSED=$((END-START)); if [ $ELAPSED -le 5 ]; then echo "ok elapsed=${ELAPSED}s" >&2; else echo "FAIL elapsed=${ELAPSED}s exceeds 5s" >&2; exit 1; fi
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "const x${i}: number = ${i};" > src/f${i}.ts; done
